sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: IShares China Large-Cap ETF Options Spot-On: On March 30th, 74,691 Contracts Were Traded, With 3.91 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 30th, the iShares China Large-Cap ETF (FXI.US) saw significant options trading, with a total volume of 74,691 contracts. Call options accounted for 57.38% of transactions, while put options made up 42.62%. The open interest for FXI reached approximately 3.91 million contracts, representing 84.56% of the 30-day average.

feed.title: Analysts Remain Bullish on Vox Royalty (VOXR) Following Company’s Inclusion in the VanEck Junior Gold Miners ETF
feed.summary: Analysts continue to hold a bullish stance on Vox Royalty (VOXR) after the company's inclusion in the VanEck Junior Gold Miners ETF, which is expected to boost investor visibility and liquidity. The company anticipates significant royalty and net precious metal receipt growth of 70% to 90% in 2026, alongside a 20% increase in its quarterly dividend. Vox Royalty, based in Ontario, Canada, is a precious metals royalty and streaming company with a diverse portfolio of licenses across seven jurisdictions.

feed.title: I interviewed the CEOs of Reddit, Colgate-Palmolive, and 6 other top companies about leading for the long run. Here's what they said
feed.summary: The article discusses how top CEOs focus on long-term success despite pressure for immediate results, contrasting this with President Kennedy's "Moon shot" mentality. The author interviewed eight CEOs, including Noel Wallace of Colgate-Palmolive, to understand their practical approaches to conviction when outcomes are uncertain and expensive. It highlights the importance of tenacity and building structural conditions for sustained efforts.

feed.title: JPMorgan to increase small-business lending, hire more credit officers
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase plans a significant expansion of its small-business lending and support services, aiming to increase its small business clients from 7 million to 10 million over the next decade. This initiative, called the "American Dream Initiative," involves lending $80 billion to small businesses and hiring 1,000 additional credit officers and 150 senior business consultants, focusing on specific regions like Alabama and metropolitan areas. The program seeks to boost local U.S. economies and expand economic benefits to more people.

feed.title: Whoop Raises $575M at $10.1B Valuation, Abbott Joins as Investor
feed.summary: Whoop, the human performance company known for its screenless wearable, has raised $575 million in a Series G round, achieving a $10.1 billion valuation. Healthcare giant Abbott has joined as a strategic investor, signaling Whoop's expansion into personalized, preventive health. The capital will support U.S. growth and international expansion, further building on its 2.5 million global members.

feed.title: Tesla forecast report predicts a boost in year-over-year sales
feed.summary: Tesla's recent forecast indicates an anticipated increase in year-over-year sales, despite an expected decline from the previous quarter. The report, based on analyst estimates, suggests 365,645 units delivered globally in the first quarter, representing a 9% rise from the same period last year. Additionally, the company projects significant growth in its energy storage segment, with a record 14.4 gigawatt-hours in deployments.

feed.title: ThinkLabs AI Closes $28 M Series A Led by Energy Impact Partners, Backed by NVentures and Edison International
feed.summary: ThinkLabs AI, a company focused on AI-powered grid intelligence, has successfully closed a $28 million Series A funding round. The investment was led by Energy Impact Partners, with significant participation from NVentures (NVIDIA’s venture capital arm) and Edison International. This funding will support ThinkLabs AI in expanding customer delivery, broadening its product portfolio of physics-informed AI digital twins, and scaling deployments to help utilities manage the surging electricity demand driven by the AI revolution.
